overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush forest environment. The character traverses rocky terrain, follows a stream bank, and moves through dense woodland with distinctive red fungal vegetation toward ancient ruins.

events.description: character begins descending from rocky outcrop toward the stream below

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating down rocky terrain toward the water's edge, surveying the forest ahead

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with rough craggy texture dominating the foreground
dense pine forest forming a dark green backdrop against the sky
clear running water visible through the trees with rocky banks
snow-capped mountain visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky hillside with the character standing on a craggy outcrop. The camera follows as she begins descending toward a stream below, with dense coniferous forest and distant mountains visible under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream bank with mixed birch and pine forest

events.description: reaches the stream bank and begins following alongside the water
turns slightly left away from stream heading into denser forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy bank of the stream surrounded by lush green vegetation

entered.detail: slender white-trunked trees with sparse leaves growing along the bank
patches of bright red fungal growth characteristic of the forest floor
light-colored sandy soil along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character follows the stream bank through a mixed forest of birch and pine. The lighting becomes dappled as tree cover increases, and distinctive red fungal vegetation appears on the forest floor as the path begins to turn away from the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with prominent red fungal flora

events.description: enters denser forest area with thick canopy cover and undergrowth
ancient stone ruins become visible through the trees in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense undergrowth and red vegetation toward distant stone structures

entered.detail: weathered gray stone structures partially hidden by trees and vegetation
exposed gnarled roots crossing the dirt path
large boulders covered in green moss lining the trail

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the forest, the canopy thickens and red fungal growth becomes prominent along the path. Ancient stone ruins appear in the distance ahead as the character navigates over twisted roots and mossy rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching ancient ruins with mechanical entities

events.description: mechanical creatures with blue glowing components become visible near the ruins
slows pace while cautiously approaching the ruins area

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching ancient ruins while observing mechanical creatures in the distance

notable_agents.action: mechanical creature with blue glowing components standing near stone ruins

entered.detail: ruined stone archway structure emerging from the forest
large moss-covered rocks flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the ancient ruins more cautiously as mechanical creatures become visible near the stone structures. The path winds through mossy boulders and dense red vegetation toward a stone archway, with the ruins now clearly visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open hillside down into a dense, fungal-infested forest leading toward ancient ruins. It begins on a craggy outcrop under the midday sun, descending a rocky slope toward a stream flanked by coniferous trees and distant mountains. As the character follows the stream bank, the lighting shifts to a dappled glow beneath a canopy of birch and pine, where the terrain begins to transition from water's edge to a forest floor dotted with distinctive red fungal vegetation. The scene then deepens into a thick woodland of twisted roots and mossy rocks, with the red growth becoming more prominent as ancient stone ruins emerge in the distance. Finally, the path winds through mossy boulders and dense vegetation, approaching a stone archway where mechanical creatures linger near the ruins.
